$comment: Allowlist + verify contract for the standalone dog product (docs/dog-park-standalone-deploy-plan.md). Cloudflare project: dog-park (wrangler.dog.jsonc). Consumed by vite/dogDeployAssetsPlugin.mjs (build-time copy) and scripts/verify-dog-bundle.mjs / verify-dog-asset-manifest.mjs (verify).

notes.studio: Procedural dog needs no GLB. dog-ref INCLUDED (compare on by default); _headers for cache/security parity with the main playground deploy.
notes.park: Phase P (not yet promoted): add forest species dirs (exact IDs from createDogParkLevel), forest-leaves subset, dog-anims/; dog-ref optional drop. Do not flip "phase" to "park" until docs/dog-park-standalone-deploy-plan.md §4.3.1 checklist L1-L9 is green.
